programme.title: The Final Battle
programme.desc: An accident brings one crabber's career to a gruesome end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 1
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode. This time around they're hunting whitetail deer in Wisconsin on the famed Duren farm with Doug Duren and Steve as their guides. Arriving a few days early to scout and tune up their shooting with some squirrel hunting, the ladies enter the next chapter of their hunting journey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater - Big Sky, Bigger Birds: Montana Wild Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and his brother Matt load up the llamas for a backcountry spring Turkey hunt in Montana's Powder River Breaks. They will pack deep into the rugged badlands to find gobbling birds. With two tags each, there's plenty of action and camp-fried turkey schnitzel is on the menu.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Fair Chase: Arizona Mountain Lion
programme.desc: In the harsh desert Southwest, Steven Rinella has come to learn the truth about tracking a mountain lions.

programme.title: MeatEater - Crossing Borders: Mexican Bison
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads into the mountains of the Sonora Desert on a true, wild, free-ranging bison hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Strange Hunt in a Strange Land: New Zealand Red Stag
programme.desc: Steven Rinella is on New Zealand's South Island for a do-it-yourself, free-range hunt for the majestic red stag. But first, he needs to secure some camp meat in the form of wild lamb. Battling weather and wary game in mountainous terrain, he uses his spot-and-stalk hunting skills to discover Kiwi red stags are a trophy worthy of the wall and the cook pot.

programme.title: MeatEater - Bush Pig: New Zealand Wild Boar
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and local pig hunting expert, Darren Moore, spend a wild, action-packed day tracking down Captain Cook boars in the thick New Zealand bush. Their tools for the job include two tough little pig dogs, a knife, and some real grit. Wild pigs are dangerous critters and this is as visceral as a hunt gets. Along the way, Steve learns a new technique for field-prepping whole hogs.

programme.title: Capítulo 143
programme.desc: Pilar tries to get Lupita and Tomás together for hidden reasons. Paola rejects Diego after seeing León. Miguel, Nico, and Teo plan to follow Tomás and Giovanni to see which is in the Lodge. Giovanni hires a man to pose as his rich father. León tells Diego that Paola is a whore. Nico and Miguel get ambushed by the suspect. Celina is comforted by Miguel on the subject of image.

programme.title: Capítulo 144
programme.desc: Gastón invites Mia out on a date. Giovanni's fake parents aren't what they seem. Vico follows Celina to find out her secret appointment. Carlo tells Roberta he has a surprise for her. Franco and Valeria come to see if Mia lied about staying at school so she could go out with Gastón.

programme.title: Capítulo 145
programme.desc: Carlo and Roberta go drag racing. Giovanni tries to ride a horse. Vico realizes the place Celina visited. Nico tries to ruin Lupita's date. León has Diego fight his anger out. Raquel finds out Giovanni lied. Diego give Nico his guitar; Nico sees the matching shoes in Diego, Tomás, Giovanni's room. Roberta and Carlo are arrested; revealing Mia's lie.

programme.title: Capítulo 146
programme.desc: Franco finds out Mia isn't with Carlo and Roberta. Paola begs for Diego's forgiveness, which he gives, but refuses to take her back. Mia and Gastón go out on a date. Vico calls Celina's mom to stop her from making a life change. Carlo and Robert go search for Mia. Celina's mom sets her up on a date; however, the date proves to be beneficial to Celina. Roberta ruins Simon's date by saying she's pregnant and underage.

programme.title: Capítulo 147
programme.desc: Nico breaks up with Karen. Gastón tells Mia he wants to speak to her dad. Teo receives a gift. Simon plans to get Roberta back for flattening his tires. Paola lies to Roberta that her and Diego are back together to get revenge. Miguel tells Teo he will take his place at the Lodge initiation.

programme.title: Capítulo 148
programme.desc: León gives Diego a brand new car; Roberta crashes it. Gastón confronts Mia about her lingering feelings for Miguel. The Lodge figures out Miguel took Teo place; the later kidnap and torture Teo. Miguel and Mia kiss. Nico is told by Karen's father that the band is no longer welcome at his club. Giovanni, Diego, and Tomás put Madariaga's picture on an online dating site.

programme.title: Capítulo 149
programme.desc: Nico is upset about Karen's father, Jacobo's, decision about the band. Gastón orders Mia to call her father so they can talk. Teo is tied up by the Lodge and tortured. Diego finds out it was Roberta who crashed his car. Viviana misleads Franco to get Mia in trouble. The other band members try to convince Diego to come back to the band; without him they can't perform at the club. José's tutor comes to take her out but also to tell her to get close to Gastón. Gastón follows Mia and sees the band.

programme.title: Capítulo 150
programme.desc: The band finds out Gastón saw them perform; Miguel blames Mia, the others agree. Giovanni tries to rescue Teo but they are both caught and tortured. Nico tells his mother that he is in love with Lupita, not Karen. It's revealed that Pilar is in the Lodge. Viviana threatens Mia that she will tell Franco; later writes a fake fan letter even after Miguel asked her not to. Nico's mom tells Lupita to break up with Nico if she loves him.

programme.title: Capítulo 151
programme.desc: Giovanni climbs through the vents, onto the roof, then falls where he is later found by Tomás and Lupita. Gastón rebuffs Mia. Miguel, Diego, Tomás and Nico try to get Gandia to listen to them about the Lodge. A woman from the online dating site confronts a confused Madariaga. Gastón receives a love note from Mia. Roberta disrespectfully embarrasses Alma in front of Carlo and the others; however she is mistaken. Madariaga and the other boys help save Teo.

programme.title: Capítulo 152
programme.desc: Gandia and Mendiola want to act like the Lodge doesn't exist. Miguel tries to draw the Lodge out. Franco tells Mia that Valeria will move in. Diego curses Giovanni and calls him a traitor. The kids are lied to about Teo's condition. The Lodge plans revenge on Miguel. Mia decides to play Valeria's game. Giovanni reflects on the good and bad. José makes a deal with Gastón so she can see Teo; she tells his father she's his girlfriend; she reveals her true feelings.

programme.title: La boda imposible
programme.desc: Albertano le confiesa a Lucha que está enamorado de María y quiere casarse con ella. María debe decidir si quedarse con Albertano o iniciar una vida al lado de un nuevo amor.

programme.title: El sueño angélico
programme.desc: María de todos los Ángeles es una tierna chica cansada de dar la prueba de amor por todos lados, no pierde la esperanza de encontrar al hombre de su vida. Una noche por revelación divina, sus ángeles de la guarda le anuncian la llegada de su ser amado, pero tendrá que realizar una serie de peripecias al seguir una las señales para que esto ocurra. Mientras tanto su vecina Doña Lucha con quien no tiene buena relacion y que es madre de El Chino y Rosa Aurora, recibe la llegada de su hijo consentido Albertano quien se había ausentado para probar suerte en Estados Unidos. Albertano decide vivir solo en el cuarto de azotea ya que siente que el viaje lo ha hecho un hombre maduro e independiente, claro mientras que su madre le lave, le planche, le suba el desayuno y le prenda el boiler. María no encuentra las señales, pero en la noche mientras tiende tristemente su ropa en la azotea, descubre a Albertano quien le ayuda caballerosamente a tender sus sabanas, María ve en ello la señal que había estado esperando.

programme.title: Mas que un mensajero
programme.desc: Aurelio warns Ruti. Pau is love struck. Arelys loves magazines. Leandro welcomes 30-30. Jorge is captured by Penumbra's men. Grenas locates Pastrana. Casillas fires two grenades Tony's way but he escapes.

programme.title: Torturan a Salazar
programme.desc: Casillas is happy to hear of Penumbra's catch. Monica finds Ruti and Javi together. Raymundo and Leandro meet with Penumbra and Doble 30. Aurelio tortures Salazar. Felina says her goodbyes to Jorge. Monica is worried.

programme.title: Alianza para matar
programme.desc: Monica tells Esperanza of Jorge. Tony meets Esperanza and asks her to partner with him. The Arabs watch Ninon and Leonardo. Wig cautions Isma of Pau's friend Arelys. Felina is weary of Raymundo's ties in Cali. Aurelio returns home.

programme.title: De hombre a hombre
programme.desc: Arelys comes clean with Pau. Aurelio meets his grandchildren. Esperanza and Tony share same tastes as does Omar and Jaime. Aurelio and Javi chat and he okays their courtship. Eunice warns Ray as Penumbra does Leandro. Isma is feeling down.

programme.title: Testigo, pero no complice
programme.desc: Monica and Aurelio share a fleeting moment. Aurelio compliments his daughter. Monica joins Tony and Esperanza but wont agree to killing Casillas. Jorge is freed by Colon and Castillo. Aurelio must find the tanker and a new port of call.

programme.title: Traicion o negocios
programme.desc: Ruti warns Carmen of Aureilo. Aurelio visits Tata and encourages her to keep hope. Monica Tony and Esperanza form a new alliance and strategy. Felina is en route to Mexico to buy silver. Isma confronts Pau on Arelys.

programme.title: La depresion de Esperanza
programme.desc: The authorities have located the tanker. Colon Jorge and Castillo are headed there as are Isma Aurelio Ninon and Ray. Felina pays a visit to Dalvio and Tata as does Omar to Ruti. Esperanza gets drunk same goes for Juan Carlos.

programme.title: La Felina no como cuentos
programme.desc: Felina threatens Ninon. Monica leaves Tony in Spain. Colon goes to Europe. Esperanza calls her parents. She also escapes Skinny and the Maras in Kansas City. Aurelio sits down with Felina on staying in business with Ninon.

programme.title: Peligrosa atraccion
programme.desc: Feline and Aurelio toast in honor of Pilar. Monica feels despair. Dalvio confronts Tata's secret. Pau returns home taking note of Carmen. Javi and Ruti awaken together. Jorge calls Ruti looking for Sebas. Feline tracks Pilar's phone.

programme.title: De cara a la prensa
programme.desc: Ruti orders Pompeyo to cover up any relationship with Sebas. Monica asks for Omar's help with Isidro. Eunice finds witnesses. Esperanza has an altercation with a farmer. Ruti agrees to interview with Carla. Grenas finds evidence.

programme.title: Ex amantes que negocian
programme.desc: Aurelio meets with Monica and Feline with Ninon. Jorge goes to Venezuela undercover. Tony is close to finding the shipment. Aurelio agrees with Monica on Isidro. Both Tony and Feline find Ninon's weakness. Esperanza is en route to Chicago.

programme.desc: Luisito le da un regalo a Silvita por su cumpleanos, pero ella no lo esperaba. En tanto que, Calaco decide visitar a Rocco en su casa.

programme.title: Tendedero
programme.desc: Magdalena decides to put a clothesline in the middle of the corridors of the building and Luis will look for a way to remove it.

programme.title: Amigos
programme.desc: Silvia agrega a Luis al chat de la guardería y Germán recibe la visita de sus amigos comentaristas de TUDN que transmiten un partido desde la conserjería.

programme.title: Auto nuevo
programme.desc: Luis le compra un auto nuevo a Silvia para que pasee con Luisito Jr. y Morris le tiene una mala noticia a sus padres: no le gusta el rock.

programme.title: Tacos veganos
programme.desc: Virginia y Borre terminan su relacion y no conforme, ella decide iniciar su propio negocio de tacos veganos. Arturo se encuentra un billete de mil pesos.

programme.title: Ropa de paca
programme.desc: Jorjáis decide invertir en un negocio de ropa de paca y descubre que no está solo, tiene competencia. Silvia y Luis buscan sobrevivir al primer día de guardería de Luisito Jr.

programme.title: Silvia party loving
programme.desc: Karla, la sobrina de Silvia, la visita en su casa, y ella finge que tiene una actitud muy cool y se va de parranda con ella. Pedro se siente mal y no puede salir de su cuarto.

programme.title: Nano por un día
programme.desc: La guardería está cerrada y Silvia y Luis no tienen quién cuide a Luisito Jr., por lo que tendrán que elegir entre los vecinos. Hipólito, Pedro y Germán buscan hacer válida la garantía de un celular.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El grupo de whats
programme.desc: Germán convoca a una junta vecinal, pero nadie asiste porque nadie vio el anuncio en el pizarrón, Jorjais les propone hacer un grupo de chat para enterarse de los acontecimientos en el edificio.

programme.title: El gas
programme.desc: Como es costumbre en el edificio, los vecinos no pagan la cuota del gas, y ante la negativa de todos, Luis decide poner su propio tanque estacionario ¡en la azotea!

programme.title: Franeleros
programme.desc: Luis estaciona su carro afuera de su edificio y un franelero quiere cobrarle 20 pesos por cuidar su coche. Los vecinos hacen una junta para planear quitarlos sin que haya consecuencias.

programme.title: El reciclaje
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura. Algo muy básico: orgánica e inorgánica, Germán es el encargado de dicha misión.

programme.title: La fiesta de Morris
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspicious man decides to take his chances with the wrong end of a taser; a lawbreaker tries to convince the cops that he's a good guy; deputies smell trouble during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers enter a darkened building to stop a robbery; confront a cyclist; and encounter a frightened woman who has trouble staying calm when she gets pulled over.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cops help a distressed woman escape an abusive fiance; a motorist's passenger causes trouble; and authorities encounter an overly friendly man.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Cameras catch police in action as they confront crime and comfort victims.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A frightened young lawbreaker does everything she can to escape jail. Grandpa comes to the rescue when Mom fails to do the right thing. A simple traffic stop leads one deputy to suspect an elderly couple of criminal activity.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Emotions run high during a dispute with alcohol and a beloved pet; a talkative motorist struggles to keep his story straight; deputies investigate a domestic incident and find the aggressor in an awkward spot.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A father reports his son to the cops; a lawbreaker tries to blame his actions on family obligations; and officers come across odd items while searching a man's vehicle.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A crafty man tries everything to elude police; Good Samaritans put their lives on hold when they spot a violent crime in progress.

programme.title: Between a Bush and a Hard Place
programme.desc: A driver flees on foot after a chase.

programme.title: Manic Monday
programme.desc: An escaped felon looks for safety.

programme.title: Gun in the Front, Rifle in the Back
programme.desc: Deputies pull a man from a car wreck.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Police officers, constables and sheriff's deputies patrol the streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Take a Ride With Me
programme.desc: A traffic stop turns dangerous when a driver takes off with a deputy halfway inside the vehicle; recent changes in the law and a forthright attitude help a man avoid jail time; a neighborhood man gives motorists a scare.

programme.title: Funny Way of Learning
programme.desc: Police officers, constables and sheriff's deputies patrol the streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else on the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Scared Shirtless
programme.desc: A business owner flags down officers when an erratic man starts climbing on his car; unusual circumstances allow officers to cut a driver some slack for being honest; a man forgets to return a car after running errands.

programme.title: Cowboy Take Me Away
programme.desc: A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered; an unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift; a friendly woman has a thing for cowboys.

programme.title: Acting Kinda Shady
programme.desc: In Hamilton County, Tenn., police attempt to box in a fleeing car with two suspects inside; in Riverside County, Calif., police pull over a driver with an expired registration.

programme.title: Start Your Engines
programme.desc: Police deploy spike strips to put an end to a dangerous stolen vehicle pursuit; an alleged mechanic says he has permission to drive a semi-truck, but the owner says otherwise.

programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A boyfriend saves his girlfriend from jail on her birthday.

programme.title: Who Can It Be Now?
programme.desc: A runaway cyclist dips into a house to catch his breath. A deputy tries to cut a man some slack despite his mistakes. The owners of an empty house call the police when they hear someone else inside.
